title: Oaks Better Bunnies
description: Updates just the bunny textures to have the eyes on the side of the face
body: In version 26.1-snapshot-2 Mojang remodeled the bunny model improving it a whole lot, however they still have the front facing eyes similar to other predator mobs, and since they are not one, this resourcepack aims to changes this by relocating the bunny eyes to the side.
